name: Paracetamol
description: It is used to treat mild to moderate pain (from headaches, menstrual periods, toothaches, backaches, osteoarthritis, or cold/flu aches and pains) and to reduce fever.
precautions: Do not exceed the recommended dose. Avoid alcohol while taking this medication. Consult a doctor with severe liver issues.

name: Ibuprofen
description: Used to relieve pain from various conditions such as headache, dental pain, and muscle aches.
precautions: Risk of stomach bleeding. Avoid alcohol.

name: Amoxil
description: A penicillin antibiotic used to treat many different types of infection caused by bacteria, such as tonsillitis, bronchitis, pneumonia, and infections of the ear, nose, throat, skin, or urinary tract.
precautions: Do not use if you are allergic to amoxicillin or to any other penicillin antibiotic. Finish the entire course of medication.

name: Amoxicillin
description: Used to treat a wide variety of bacterial infections.
precautions: Risk of allergic reaction. Consult physician if you have kidney disease.

name: Metformin
description: Metformin is used with a proper diet and exercise program and possibly with other medications to control high blood sugar in patients with type 2 diabetes.
precautions: Consult doctor if you have kidney issues or metabolic acidosis.

name: Lipitor
description: Reduces levels of bad cholesterol (low-density lipoprotein, or LDL) and triglycerides in the blood, while increasing levels of good cholesterol.
precautions: Do not use if pregnant or nursing. Advise doctor of any muscle pain immediately. Avoid grapefruit juice.

name: Lisinopril
description: Used to treat high blood pressure. Lowering high blood pressure helps prevent strokes and heart attacks.
precautions: Risk of high potassium levels. Consult doctor.

name: Atorvastatin
description: Used along with a proper diet to help lower bad cholesterol and fats.
precautions: Avoid grapefruit juice. Consult doctor if you have liver disease.

name: Omeprazole
description: Used to treat certain stomach and esophagus problems such as acid reflux and ulcers.
precautions: Consult doctor if you have osteoporosis or lupus.

name: Levothyroxine
description: Used to treat an underactive thyroid (hypothyroidism).
precautions: Risk of heart problems. Consult physician regularly for dosage checks.

name: Albuterol
description: Inhaler for treating asthma and exercise-induced asthma.
sideEffects: Dry mouth, cough, shortness of breath
cautions: Avoid in patients with known hypersensitivity to albuterol

name: Loratadine
description: Temporary relief of allergy symptoms. Dosage: 10mg tablets.
sideEffects: Sneezing, runny nose, itching of the eyes, nose, or throat
precautions: Avoid during pregnancy and breastfeeding. Consult a healthcare professional if symptoms persist or worsen.

name: Sertraline
description: Sertraline is a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI) used to treat depression, panic attacks, obsessive compulsive disorder, post-traumatic stress disorder, social anxiety disorder (social phobia), and a severe form of premenstrual syndrome (premenstrual dysphoric disorder).
Precautions: Use caution in patients with a history of liver disease.
Stop taking sertraline if you have allergies to any of the ingredients
